characters.appearance: Young adult East Asian male, slim build, fair complexion. Short black hair, rectangular glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Black crew-neck sweater over a white collared shirt. Silver watch on left wrist.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I am very busy. Or, I have a lot on my plate. [I am very busy. Or, I have a lot on my plate.]
Unknown speaker says: I have a lot on my plate. [I have a lot on my plate.]
Character A says: I am listening. Or, I am all ears. [I am listening. Or, I am all ears.]
Unknown speaker says: I'm all ears. [I'm all ears.]
Character A says: Let's meet today. Or, let's catch up today. [Let's meet today. Or, let's catch up today.]
Unknown speaker says: Let's catch up today. [Let's catch up today.]
Character A says: I will pay. Or, it's on me. [I will pay. Or, it's on me.]
Unknown speaker says: It's on me. [It's on me.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable comparison between basic and confident English.
- Establishes the value of practical, real-world vocabulary over textbook phrases.
- Sets an energetic, educational tone right from the start.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Basic English
Confident English
I am very busy
I have a lot on my plate
I am listening
I'm all ears
Let's meet today
Let's catch up today
I will pay
It's on me

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English सीखने का सबसे बड़ा झूठ? [The biggest lie about learning English?] कि आपको सिर्फ़ grammar और vocabulary रटनी है। [That you just need to memorize grammar and vocabulary.] बिलकुल नहीं! [Not at all!] आपको बोलने की practice करनी है। [You need to practice speaking.] Hey Supernova, आज office meeting के लिए कुछ phrases सिखाओगे? [Hey Supernova, will you teach me some phrases for today's office meeting?]
Unknown speaker says: ज़रूर! [Sure!] Office meetings के लिए हम professional phrases से शुरू कर सकते हैं। [We can start with professional phrases for office meetings.] क्या आप presentation दे रहे हैं या discussion में हिस्सा ले रहे हैं? [Are you giving a presentation or participating in a discussion?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses a common learner pain point (memorizing grammar vs. actual speaking).
- Demonstrates the app's AI tutor feature in a highly relevant real-world scenario (office meeting).
- Shows the interactive, conversational, and personalized nature of the product.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English सीखने का सबसे बड़ा झूठ?
सिर्फ़ grammar रटना है
बिलकुल नहीं!
आपको बोलने की practice करनी है
Hey Supernova, आज office meeting के लिए कुछ phrases सिखाओगे?
ज़रूर! Office meetings के लिए हम professional phrases से शुरू कर सकते हैं।
क्या आप presentation दे रहे हैं या discussion में हिस्सा ले रहे हैं?

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसीलिए Supernova काम करता है, [That's why Supernova works,] क्योंकि ये आपके फ़ोन में आपका personal AI English tutor है। [because it's your personal AI English tutor in your phone.] सिर्फ़ English पढ़ना छोड़ो, [Stop just reading English,] और Supernova के साथ confidently बोलना शुरू करो। [and start speaking confidently with Supernova.] See ya! [See ya!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong call to action to download the app.
- Reinforces the core value proposition (a personal AI tutor in your pocket).
- Ends on a warm, encouraging note typical of the Supernova brand voice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
इसीलिए Supernova काम करता है
आपका personal AI English tutor
सिर्फ़ English पढ़ना छोड़ो
Supernova के साथ confidently बोलना शुरू करो
Supernova - AI English Tutor
Learn and practice speaking
GET IT ON Google Play
Download on the App Store
See ya
